title: Since version 1.8.3-0.1.dev.gitaa6c8c2.fc33 all console utilities in container working only in 80x25 chars .
body:
Since version 1.8.3-0.1.dev.gitaa6c8c2.fc33 all console utilities in container working only in 80x25 chars .

![Screenshot from 2020-03-23 10-07-27](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/200750/77284816-6673ba80-6cf1-11ea-98f7-2ec35f10f1c6.png)

Last good version is 1.8.2-0.9.dev.gitcccd05c.fc33

comments.body: More details would be greatly appreciated - is this with `podman exec`, or `podman run`, or both?

> More details would be greatly appreciated - is this with `podman exec`, or `podman run`, or both?

It's the result of both commands.

1. `$ podman run my-super-container`
2. `$ podman exec -it inside mc` -- here see the bug
